Dorothy and the Lion lead a search party across a rocky plain, discovering the rusted Tin Woodman. They bring him back to the castle where Winkie tinsmiths spend three days repairing his body with patches.
From desperation/worry to relief and gratitude.
Dorothy and cowardly_lion leading a search party across an expansive rocky terrain.
The repaired tin_woodman standing among the winkies in the workshop.
Searching for, discovering, transporting, and repairing the Tin Woodman.
